headline: AES Posts New Fixed Income Investor Materials
summary: Today, The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) posted new fixed income investor materials to its website, titled "Parent Liquidity Schedules". To download the document, go to the AES website at www.aes.com, then choose Investors, and then Fixed Income Resources & Debt Summary. This presentation will be updated on a quarterly basis.
